Shooting.description: Ability to create spacing pressure through shooting volume and efficiency.

TPP.description: Three-point proficiency (shrinks 3P% towards 0 for low volume shooters).

TPS.description: Three-point shooting score, accounting for volume and efficiency.

Movement.description: Ability to occupy defenders on the perimeter by being a threat as a movement shooter.

OffScreen.description: Off screen playtype score, accounting for volume and efficiency.

SpotUp.description: Spot-up playtype score, accounting for volume and efficiency.

Interior.description: Ability to produce off-ball actions through cuts and ballscreens.

Cut.description: Cut playtype score, accounting for volume and efficiency.

Rollman.description: Pick & Roll Rollman playtype score, accounting for volume and efficiency.

Motor.description: Amount of movement a player provides offensively.
